_note: Joint anchors for each rig part, in the avatar's LOCAL space. These are the exact numbers the procedural rig uses (src/render/avatar.js), so AI-generated parts line up when the engine pins + rotates them. See docs/AVATAR_ART_SPEC.md.

space.origin: feet — both feet centered at x=0, y=0

torso.note: pin at the hip line (bottom); shoulders at top (y20)

head.note: pin at the neck; head center y26; ears at +/-5.2

arm.note: shoulder pin ~+/-4,20; ONE art reused mirrored for both arms; hand/grip at the far end

leg.note: hip pin ~+/-2.2,11; ONE art reused mirrored for both legs; foot at y0

helm.note: sits over the head; brow band ~y24, dome above; leave gaps for ears

weapon.note: grip = where the hand wraps (maps to arm.hand); tip = business end; scale/length set per-weapon in-engine
